title: Basil Fawlty
body:
![Basil Fawlty in a state of barely contained exasperation at the front desk of Fawlty Towers](/memes/british/basil-fawlty.webp)

Basil Fawlty — the man who should not be running a hotel, but somehow is.

title: Tis But a Scratch
body:
![The Black Knight from Monty Python and the Holy Grail, defiantly armless](/memes/british/black-knight.webp)

"Tis but a scratch!" — The Black Knight, Monty Python and the Holy Grail.

title: Cunning Plan
body:
![Baldrick presenting one of his famously terrible cunning plans to a sceptical Blackadder](/memes/british/blackadder-cunning-plan.webp)

"I have a cunning plan." — Baldrick. It was never a good plan.

title: The British Queue
body:
![A perfectly orderly British queue stretching into the distance, everyone patiently waiting their turn](/memes/british/british-queue.webp)

The British queue — a moral framework disguised as a line.

title: British Tea
body:
![A perfectly brewed cup of British tea, the answer to all of life's problems](/memes/british/british-tea.webp)

The British solution to every problem: a nice cup of tea.

title: Dead Parrot
body:
![The Dead Parrot sketch — a customer attempts to return a very dead Norwegian Blue parrot to a pet shop](/memes/british/dead-parrot.webp)

The Dead Parrot sketch — Monty Python's Flying Circus. "This parrot is no more!"

title: Lovely Jubbly
body:
![Del Boy Trotter in his sheepskin coat, giving a thumbs up with characteristic optimism](/memes/british/del-boy.webp)

"Lovely jubbly!" — Del Boy Trotter, Only Fools and Horses.

title: Ministry of Silly Walks
body:
![John Cleese performing his iconic Ministry of Silly Walks routine](/memes/british/ministry-of-silly-walks.webp)

John Cleese's Ministry of Silly Walks — the greatest use of a government budget in history.

title: Mr. Bean
body:
![Mr. Bean pulling one of his trademark expressions of bewildered self-satisfaction](/memes/british/mr-bean.webp)

Mr. Bean — proof that you don't need words to be the funniest man alive.

title: Nobody Expects
body:
![The Spanish Inquisition bursting through a door in Monty Python's Flying Circus](/memes/british/spanish-inquisition.webp)

Nobody expects the Spanish Inquisition! Our chief weapon is surprise.
